name: anchor-x402-mcp
description: 16 pay-per-call USDC tools on Base + Solana mainnet — nine commodity primitives (hash anchoring, OFAC sanctions screening, signed decision attestation, tx + calldata decode, ENS/SNS resolution, USD token price, datetime parser, bundled wallet intel), one async due-diligence investigator (`/v1/investigate`, $7.77), one verifiable signed RNG (`/v1/roll`), and five universal LLM endpoints (roast, oracle with anchored verdict, tldr, aura, grade). Auto-pay via `x402-fetch` + `viem`; configure one `BASE_PRIVATE_KEY` env var, no API keys. Install: `npx anchor-x402-mcp`. MIT.
